text:
The home health record at each 
visit should document the need for the psychiatric skilled nursing services and treatment. 
The home health record must also reflect the patient/caregiver response to any 
interventions provided. 

EXAMPLE 2: 

A patient is homebound after discharge following hip replacement surgery and is 
receiving skilled therapy services for range of motion exercise and gait training. In the 
past, the patient had been diagnosed with clinical depression and was successfully
